hero.title: All-in-One Color Tool
hero.subtitle: Professional color analysis tool for photographers and designers
hero.description: Extract colors from images, analyze luminance distribution, generate harmonious color schemes, manage palettes, and preview color effects - a complete workflow from color analysis to application

features.title: Powerful Features
features.subtitle: Complete color workflow from extraction to application

colorExtract.title: Visual Color Extraction
colorExtract.description: Real-time color extraction via draggable color pickers, supporting multiple color spaces (HSB, LAB, HSL, CMYK, RGB)

colorGeneration.title: Smart Color Generation
colorGeneration.description: 5 professional color schemes (Monochromatic, Analogous, Complementary, Split-Complementary, Double Complementary) with interactive color wheel

paletteManagement.title: Palette Management
paletteManagement.description: Save and manage color schemes, support batch import/export in JSON format, build your personal color library

builtInPalettes.title: Built-in Color Library
builtInPalettes.description: 13 major open-source color schemes including Open Color, Tailwind CSS, Material Design, totaling 661 color palettes

colorPreview.title: Color Preview
colorPreview.description: 8 built-in scene previews (Mobile UI, Web, Illustration, Typography, Brand, Poster, Pattern, Magazine) with custom SVG support

luminanceAnalysis.title: Luminance Analysis
luminanceAnalysis.description: 5-zone luminance segmentation with histogram visualization to assist color grading decisions

palettes.title: 13 Professional Color Schemes
palettes.subtitle: 661 curated color palettes covering design systems, terminal themes, and artistic palettes

download.title: Get Started Now
download.subtitle: No internet required, no registration needed, privacy secure, one-step access

footer.description: Color Card is an all-in-one color tool and image color analysis tool for photographers and designers
